title: DLRS Assam Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 552 Land Record Assistant Posts
description: Directorate of Land Records & Surveys Assam (DLRS Assam) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 552  Land Record Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass or 12th can grab this chance and apply for the DLRS Assam Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply online for these posts. If you are looking for more, here...
